page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.6xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. The instance features 24 dedicated physical cores and 24 vCPUs, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a base frequency of 3.2 GHz. It is equipped with 144.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 6.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type includes 3839 GB of local SSD storage, making it suitable for applications requiring high-capacity, low-latency local storage. The network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer rates across cloud environments. No dedicated GPU hardware is included in this configuration.

The combination of dedicated Intel Xeon processor cores, a high-capacity local SSD, and 50 Gbps network bandwidth offers a balanced hardware profile for data-intensive workloads. The resource allocation is optimized for database hosting, high-throughput storage applications, and general-purpose enterprise workloads that require dedicated CPU execution without hyperthreading overhead.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.6xlarge is an x86_64 server instance built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C physical cores running at 3.2 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 144.0 GB of RAM, yielding 6.0 GB of memory per core, and is bundled with 3839 GB of local SSD storage. Networking capabilities feature a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is designed for high-performance storage and database workloads, general-purpose enterprise applications, and data-intensive tasks requiring dedicated CPU execution and high-speed local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.6xlarge is a KVM-based server with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 144 GB RAM, 3839 GB local SSD storage, and 50 Gbps network bandwidth for database and storage workloads.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon server featuring high-capacity local SSD storage and high-speed networking for data-intensive database and storage workloads.
bullet_points: 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C physical cores operating at 3.2 GHz
144.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB of RAM per core
3839 GB of integrated local SSD storage for low-latency data access
50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Well-suited for database hosting, storage-heavy applications, and enterprise workloads
